sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106259" key="u(gropore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-πορέω</orth>, <sense id="n106259.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go through the water,</tr_> of ships, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.221</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
